problem id: c6fa3e3f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHR(2)

examples:
  00001010 -> 00000010
  01101011 -> 00011010
  01001001 -> 00010010
  00100000 -> 00001000
  11011100 -> 00110111
  00000010 -> 00000000
  10010100 -> 00100101
  11100101 -> 00111001
  01100000 -> 00011000
  11101100 -> 00111011

query: 11001101
predicted answer: 00110011
